_comment: Claude Code harness settings for the Market Analysis Agent. Permissions tuned for a flat Python/FastAPI backend layout (app/, db/, docs/, tasks/).
_hooks_note: Uncomment the hooks below once ruff + pytest are installed (either via `uv sync` or pip). Paths assume the flat layout at the repo root (no backend/ prefix).

hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then ruff check "$file" --fix-only -q; fi
